mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_tokens (user_id, token_hash, token_type, remember_me, expires_at, revoked_at, last_used_at, created_ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{tokenType}, #{rememberMe}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{createdIp}, #{userAgent})
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_tokens SET revoked_at = #{revokedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE auth_tokens SET last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM auth_tokens WHERE expires_at < #{now} OR revoked_at IS NOT NULL
